nasb.text: When they become heated up, I will serve them their banquet And make them drunk, that they may become jubilant And may sleep a perpetual sleep And not wake up,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: While they are inflamed I will prepare them a feast and make them drunk, that they may become merry, then sleep a perpetual sleep and not wake, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 他們食慾大動的時候，我必為他們擺設筵席， 使他們喝醉，狂歡亂叫， 然後永遠沉睡，不再醒來。

ccb.text: 他们食欲大振时， 我要为他们设盛宴， 使他们酩酊大醉，狂欢乱叫， 长眠不起。 这是耶和华说的。
